title: Bushes Ore
description: Adds bushes that drop valuable resources, making exploration more rewarding.
body:
This mod adds a variety of resource-bearing bushes to the game, allowing players to harvest valuable materials directly from the environment. Explore the world and discover different types of bushes that provide essential resources for crafting, building, and survival.

![Bushes ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21cf092301b6fbb29929f20b91474bcdae116c63.png)

Included bushes:
- Coal Bush: Provides coal for fuel and crafting.
- Diamond Bush: Yields diamonds for tools, armor, and enchanting.
- Emerald Bush: Drops emeralds for trading and special crafting.
- Gold Bush: Gives gold for tools, armor, and other crafting recipes.
- Iron Bush: Supplies iron for weapons, armor, and machinery.
- Quartz Bush: Produces quartz for decorative blocks and redstone devices.
- Redstone Bush: Offers redstone for circuits, automation, and magic.

Enhance your gameplay by finding and harvesting these bushes in various biomes, including the Nether. Resource Bushes make exploration more rewarding and add a new layer of strategy to collecting materials.
